name: byrd
one_liner: B2B marketplace for full-service ecommerce fulfillment.
description: Byrd is a managed B2B marketplace for eCommerce fulfillment. Their all-in-one logistics platform equips users with a comprehensive dashboard and connects to online shop systems such as Shopify and Woocommerce to make drop-shipping, eCommerce fulfillment or crowdfunding campaign management seamless. ‍ Byrd integrates with all major logistics partners in the German-speaking market and automatically finds the best provider for each shipment. The company also runs storage facilities in Europe, takes care of individual packaging, and manages pick-ups as well as returns.

name: Liqid
one_liner: Data-driven platform for private wealth management

name: Octav
one_liner: Know your cost-basis at all times and make better decisions.
description: Octav is an all-in-one platform that fills major financial information gaps by providing its users with valuable financial data, including cost basis and P&L of all their assets and NFTs on major chains. ‍ Investors also have the freedom to easily edit their inaccurate transactions, and manage their portfolio by using in-house tools to interact with the web3 ecosystem, such as buying, selling, claiming or compounding their assets directly on the platform.

name: Rainbow
one_liner: Issuing high-quality, verifiable carbon credits from industrial GreenTech SMEs in Europe.
description: Rainbow (formerly Riverse) has developed a carbon credit standard and a digital Measurement, Reporting and Verification (MRV) platform, enabling industrial GreenTech SMEs in Europe to issue carbon credits to earn money. The solution makes it possible to issue carbon credits 20 times faster and at a cost 3 times lower than current market standards. ‍ Founded in France in 2021, Rainbow aims to bring transparency and unlock high-quality supply on the carbon markets, in order to accelerate the financing of high-impact decarbonisation technologies in Europe.

name: Unweave
one_liner: Giving developers instant access to serverless infrastructure for machine learning.
description: Unweave gives developers instant access to the infrastructure they need to train their machine learning models with almost zero setup. It lets users run their machine learning code on GPUs with a single command without having to setup any custom cloud infrastructure. Our goal is to wrap the power of the cloud within the UX of your laptop. We want to turn every developer’s laptop into a supercomputer. ‍

name: Vocca AI
one_liner: Automating patient calls for healthcare providers with AI-powered assistants.
description: Vocca’s AI receptionist answers, books, and handles patient calls 24/7, eliminating hold times and freeing up staff for in-person care. The platform automates appointment scheduling, reminders, and patient queries, resolving over 80% of requests—directly in medical software or CRM. With the ability to manage 100+ simultaneous calls, securely log every conversation, and engage patients seamlessly across phone, SMS, and WhatsApp, Vocca addresses high call volumes, appointment no-shows, and staff overload. The result is faster service, happier patients, and clinics that run more efficiently and cost-effectively.

name: Conundrum
one_liner: Industrial automation powered by AI.
description: Conundrum helps industrial companies to leapfrog into Industry 4.0 by leveraging value hidden in data and introducing AI-driven technologies. ‍ The UK-based technology company's software helps industrial companies address the following: predictive maintenance, quality control and industrial processes optimization. Its software is based on its proprietary machine learning technologies for industrial time series analysis. ‍ ‍

name: Dialpad
one_liner: The AI-powered platform for modern business communications.
description: Dialpad is an AI-native cloud communications platform that unifies calls, messaging, video, and contact center operations in one system. With built-in real-time transcription, summaries, and analytics, it helps teams improve productivity and customer engagement at scale. In 2024, Dialpad joined our portfolio following its acquisition of Surfboard.

name: Klara
one_liner: The healthcare messaging platform

name: Runware
one_liner: Unified API for high-performance AI inference, enabling teams to run any AI model faster and at significantly lower cost.
description: Runware is an AI inference platform that unifies access to hundreds of AI models through a single API. By combining custom inference hardware with an optimized software stack, it delivers materially faster performance and up to 10x lower costs than traditional cloud deployments. Developers can easily switch, route, or A/B test models at scale without vendor lock-in. Runware powers billions of AI generations for consumer and enterprise products worldwide. ‍

name: tenyks
one_liner: Helping AI developers who work with computer vision data to build more reliable software faster.
description: Tenyks is a University of Cambridge spin-out, inventing the way humanity interacts with AI to protect and delight. ‍ We are building an MLOps monitoring and validation platform that helps AI developers working with computer vision data to build more reliable software faster. Specifically, our platform helps ML developers understand what’s wrong with their software and fix it.

name: 10 Percent
one_liner: Building the infrastructure that lets FMCG brands own loyalty, data, and customer relationships, not the retailers.
description: The app gives consumers 10% cashback on their favorite brands, no matter where they shop. Behind the scenes, 10% powers a data-rich, brand-centric loyalty engine that helps FMCGs activate their audiences, predict churn and trends, innovate with real insights, and retake control. Brands even secure exclusive access to their category, locking out competitors for months. 10% is creating the default operating system for brand loyalty and consumer data.

name: Asap.work
one_liner: Connecting construction companies with qualified temporary workers.
description: Asap.work is revolutionizing the future of work in the construction industry by connecting construction companies with qualified temporary workers through a digital-first offer with personalized support. At the same time, skilled workers on the platform are also able to quickly find new employment opportunities and better-paying jobs.

name: Bitfount
one_liner: A platform for federated AI and data collaboration.
description: Bitfount enables modellers to gather insights and train models from other people’s data. Because of the federated nature of the platform, Bitfount enables data providers to share the benefits of their data without ever having to give up control or privacy.

name: Boltzbit
one_liner: Cost-effective and code-free foundation AI to empower businesses and developer communities.
description: Foundation models are turbo-charging the future of AI , and it is happening right now. Built by top AI researchers, Boltzbit creates the first Foundation AI platform that allows its users to build multi-tasking continuous-learning AI from data without a single line of code. ‍ The solutions of Boltzbit AI have a wide range of use cases in financial services and digital marketing. The Boltzbit Foundation AI platform brings the open-source community, AI researchers, and AI solution builders together to push AI into the next level.

name: Koalaboox
one_liner: Financing solution for SMEs, integrated into an easy-to-use e-invoicing software.
description: Koalaboox's (acquired by Cegid in 2020) e-invoicing Software as a Service helps SMEs simplify their daily invoicing and accounting processes through tracking of revenues, expenses and payments - offering a one-click invoice financing solution built into the platform, allowing clients to fund invoices and solve their working capital needs.

name: Flowdesk
one_liner: Allowing web3 token issuers to manage their liquidity actively through Market-Making as a Service.
description: In a context of exponential growth of token issuers in the web3 space, Flowdesk is building an infrastructure to help them tackle their financial needs with a more transparent and controlled approach. ‍ Flowdesk has built a scalable infrastructure that connects crypto-exchanges to innovative products, such as Market-Making as a Service (MMaaS). MMaaS is radically different than traditional liquidity provisions where issuers fully own their liquidity and can control the strategy according to their needs. ‍ To support their vision of scalable and regulated market-making in crypto , Flowdesk offers banking-grade compliance and stringent procedures to guarantee they always work in the best interests of issuers.

name: Haaven
one_liner: A homebuilding platform surrounding customers with the best architects, engineers, and builders.
description: At Haaven, we turn home building into a stress-free experience. Our platform offers a clear, end-to-end process that eliminates surprises, whether it's where to start, how long it will take, or how much it will cost. By connecting you with a trusted network of architects, engineers, and builders, we ensure your dream home comes to life on time and within budget. We're with you from the first idea to construction and aftercare, making the process smooth and enjoyable. ‍ Europe needs more and better homes for people and the planet. Haaven meets this need by uniting construction companies across Europe onto a single platform. Our homes are built carbon neutral, using wood in prefabricated designs to reduce carbon emissions. We also preserve architectural diversity by allowing architects from all over Europe to add their designs to our platform, combining the benefits of prefab construction with unique designs.

name: Julaya
one_liner: Enabling companies to perform all their financial transactions in one single interface.
description: Julaya is a B2B digital account that enables companies to send and collect payments seamlessly through a digital account. ‍ With the Julaya platform, SME’s, large corporates and government institutions can make bulk payments through all mobile money channels, process their travel or online expenses with a corporate prepaid card, easily import all transactions into their accounting system, and digitize cash collection.

name: Leta
one_liner: Helping businesses optimize the movement of goods to reduce costs and minimize climate impact.
description: Built for Africa's unique logistics challenges, Leta’s AI-powered platform optimizes delivery routes, tracks shipments in real time, and streamlines payments while transforming shipment data into actionable insights. ‍ Since 2022, Leta has powered millions of deliveries, managed thousands of vehicles, and expanded from Kenya into Nigeria, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe—working with brands like KFC, EABL, and Chandaria Industries.

name: OneTrust
one_liner: Helping companies manage privacy, consent, and AI governance to reduce risk, build trust, and drive innovation.
description: OneTrust builds the Trust Intelligence Platform – connecting privacy, GRC, ethics, and ESG teams, data, and processes – so companies big and small can collaborate seamlessly and put trust at the center of their operations and culture. We help companies and supply chains stay resilient through the unknown. We empower ethical cultures so companies can uphold the highest standards of trust. We help measure and track ESG initiatives so companies can play a meaningful role in shaping a better future for all. ‍

name: Pactum
one_liner: AI Negotiation Platform Company

name: Shapr3D
one_liner: Quick iterative CAD for faster and better design decisions.
description: Shapr3D builds instinctive CAD tools, helping design and manufacturing teams complete complex tasks with speed and efficiency. Through their multi-platform structure, you can work flexibly across devices. ‍ A non-hierarchical toolset makes Shapr3D quickly accessible, so every team member can contribute to the workflow, boosting overall output. Download Shapr3D from the App Store, Microsoft Store, or our website.

name: TalkJS
one_liner: Providing User-to-User Messaging as a Service.
description: It takes an enormous effort to get custom messaging on a platform right. TalkJS solves this issue by introducing its one-line integration messaging service for any platform with peer-to-peer communication needs.

name: TourRadar
one_liner: Online marketplace for multi-day tours and adventures.
description: TourRadar is the leading online marketplace for multi-day tours and organized adventures. The platform makes it easy for travelers to find, compare, and book thousands of vetted small-group trips and longer organized journeys worldwide. ‍ The company's unique value is aggregating over 50,000 tours from more than 2,500 global operators, including major brands and independent local providers. This consolidation centralizes a traditionally fragmented market, offering travelers choice and price comparison for complex booking needs.

name: Abwab.ai
one_liner: AI-driven fintech platform that automates SME lending and credit decisions for banks and lenders across the Middle East and Africa.
description: Founded in Saudi Arabia, Abwab.ai is a fintech-powered AI platform that transforms SME lending through automated underwriting and credit decisioning. It enables banks and lenders across the MENA region to make near-instant, data-driven credit assessments, replacing slow manual underwriting processes. By automating loan origination, lead qualification and credit analysis, Abwab.ai reduces risk, cuts costs and accelerates the flow of capital to small and medium enterprises. The company’s mission is to bridge the vast financing gap facing SMEs – unlocking growth and inclusion through smarter, faster, and technology-driven lending.

name: Adverity
one_liner: Intelligent data platform transforming marketing data into actionable, performance-driving insights.
description: Adverity is an online marketing data analytics and reporting platform. Advertisers and marketing agencies use the platform to analyse real-time data from multiple popular marketing tools alongside offline data – such as Excel spreadsheets – to deliver insights into their marketing activities. Adverity efficiently compiles different data sources to help marketers take control of their marketing campaigns. ‍ Their products are web-based marketing intelligence and advanced analytics platforms that fully integrate input from several marketing tools into one application. This creates a united data stack for more efficient reporting, better decision making and improved marketing performance.

name: Blocktorch
one_liner: End-to-end observability platform for logs, metrics, and traces for decentralized applications.
description: Blocktorch (acquired by third web in 2024) is the observability platform for the decentralized stack, covering all observability pillars to empower web3 developers to scale every decentralized component globally and serve billions of users reliably. We help builders to understand the behaviour of a decentralised application holistically, act quickly and become data driven. By enabling best in class observability practices, blocktorch is on the mission to make web3 mass-market ready.

name: consola.finance
one_liner: The first end-to-end finance and accounting collaboration platform for web3 firms.
description: consola.finance (acquired by Request Finance in 2024) is on a mission to bring clarity and control to companies’ crypto finances with the first human-readable block(chain) explorer with dedicated finance, accounting, bookkeeping and reporting tooling. consola.finance automates crypto finance processes, saves valuable time, reduces human errors and gives companies the opportunity to make better decisions.

name: Finary
one_liner: Track all investments automatically and in real-time, regardless of the asset class.
description: Finary is a wealth management platform that provides users with an all-in-one, real-time dashboard of their investments across all asset classes. ‍ Finary counts 10,000 banks and investment platforms in Europe and the US connected to its system and covers saving accounts, stocks, crypto, real estate, precious metals, and startup investments overviews. Features such as real-time performance analysis, calculation of hidden costs and automatic identification of new opportunities allow Finary to offer tailor-made asset management that, previously, was only reserved for the wealthy.

name: Ozé
one_liner: Empowering African micro-SMEs to grow and scale.
description: Despite merchants and micro-SMEs forming the pillars on which West African economies stand, these businesses have been overwhelmingly ignored and neglected by mobile-based financial service providers. Ozé helps capture, analyze and improve the performance of business owners in Ghana and Nigeria with the ambition to become a pan-African player. Through their digital accounting system, which enables users to keep track of their records, AR and AP and get access to credit, Ozé users are able to operate like large businesses and, therefore, empowers micro-SMEs to grow and scale far beyond their current reach. Having partnered with the region’s biggest banks, SME banks and local fintechs, Ozé is able to provide its users with products from traditional financial institutions but with the seamless interface and usability of a social media platform.

name: Pliant
one_liner: A B2B payments platform built to meet the needs of high-growth businesses and embedded finance players.
description: Pliant empowers businesses worldwide with streamlined B2B payment solutions. Designed to serve industries with complex, high-volume payment needs - like travel and ecommerce - Pliant's platform allows companies to issue cards, access credit lines, and payment features directly into their workflows. ‍ With seamless integrations, white-labeling options, and real-time APIs, Pliant enables full-stack control of business payments and reconciliation.

name: Investly
one_liner: SME access to working capital through invoice financing.
description: Investly is an invoice discounting platform that allows SMEs to sell their invoices to investors, thereby increasing working capital. Invoices are sold in reverse auctions where investors place bids to ensure the best prices for merchants. ‍ The bidding system allows investors to earn above average returns. Investly’s service helps established businesses take on more customers, speed up their production process, and avoid seasonal cash flow gaps.

name: Kema
one_liner: A cash flow platform helping MENA SMEs get paid faster, automate A/R, and unlock invoice financing seamlessly.
description: Kema is revolutionizing how B2B SMEs in MENA manage their cash flow. By combining A/R automation, embedded payments, and invoice financing into one platform, the UAE-based startup empowers businesses to digitize collections, improve on-time payments, and unlock instant liquidity. With proprietary credit scoring built from ERP and payment data, Kema helps SMEs overcome late payments and limited financing access—long-standing barriers to growth in the region. ‍ ‍By embedding itself at the core of the invoice-to-cash cycle, Kema is bridging the gap between fintech and everyday business operations. Kema facilities more than $50M in annual receivables, improves collections by up to 40% and streamlines collection processed by more than 50%. As MENA moves toward further digitization and a cashless economy, Kema is uniquely positioned to become the financial operating system for the region’s $3T B2B economy.

name: Kittl
one_liner: Empowering creators to create complex designs faster and easier.
description: Kittl provides a platform that makes complex design processes easier and faster. ‍ The new browser-based graphic design tool empowers anyone to become a creator and design logos, labels, postcards or anything else. Loaded with tons of templates, illustrations, and fonts, it offers endless design possibilities.

name: Lemonflow
one_liner: The AI infrastructure layer for operations in mobility.
description: Lemonflow builds voice-based AI agents that automate customer support across EV charging and mobility. Purpose-built for the complexities of mobility infrastructure, Lemonflow’s agents deliver instant, multilingual support around the clock, resolving driver issues, triggering remote actions, and drastically cutting costs. ‍ Live with leading charge point operators across Europe, Lemonflow combines deep domain expertise with real-time system integrations to create a scalable support layer for the future of mobility.

name: LizzyAI
one_liner: Recruiting platform that uses AI-powered interviews to help companies hire faster, fairer, and more efficiently.
description: Founded in the USA by serial entrepreneur Yannis Niebelschütz, Lizzy AI is a next-generation recruiting platform that uses AI-powered, structured interviews to streamline and standardize hiring. The platform automatically generates interview questions, conducts assessments, and delivers clear, comparable scoring to reduce bias and accelerate decisions. Companies use Lizzy AI to evaluate candidates more objectively and at scale, while significantly reducing recruiter workload. The result: faster hiring, better talent matches, and an improved candidate experience.

name: Metycle
one_liner: Secondary metals trading platform

name: Pace Revenue
one_liner: Hospitality revenue management platform utilizing machine learning and statistical modelling.
description: Pace (acquired by FlyrLabs in 2022) was founded to change revenue management and help companies be more effective in their distribution and sales - empowering them to make better use of resources, generate less waste, and contribute to a better world.

name: Prewave
one_liner: Predicting supply chain and sustainability risks.
description: Prewave is an Austrian-based AI company that specializes in supply chain risk intelligence and monitoring for global enterprises. The platform continuously monitors and analyzes massive amounts of public and non-public data, including news, social media, and industry reports, to predict supply chain disruptions before they occur. ‍ The company transforms unstructured data into actionable, real-time alerts for risks like geopolitical events, factory fires, labor disputes, and sustainability violations anywhere in a company’s multi-tier supply network. ‍

name: RIVAL
one_liner: Bringing user-generated content to AR/VR.
description: Rival is building a platform that allows users to browse through immersive 3D short-form content in their spatial computing headset, in a similar fashion to how TikTok or Instagram Reels work with conventional videos. Enabling users to produce and distribute 3D experiences via their first-of-its-kind 2D-3D foundational model, Rival enables the creator economy to transition to VR, solving the industry's biggest problem - its lack of content. ‍

name: Rivia
one_liner: AI-driven analytics and data infrastructure for successful Biopharma clinical trials.
description: Rivia addresses inefficiencies in biopharma clinical trials, where fragmented data and outdated tools hinder the development of new therapies. Their technology offers a real-time, integrated view of data to improve the evaluation of new treatments and trial conduct. Their vision is to become the unified data infrastructure that transforms clinical development lifecycles, bringing new therapies to market more successfully.

name: Sona
one_liner: Workforce management built for frontline workers.
description: Sona’s mission is to put technology in the hands of frontline staff that transforms how they manage their work and engage with their employer. Designed for the specific needs of modern frontline workplaces, Sona’s employee app combines powerful productivity tools with a sleek, simple and intuitive user experience. ‍ Features include live schedule view, absence management, instant messaging, and Open Shifts, an innovative shift booking platform matching shift vacancies with employees willing to take on more hours. Trailblazing organisations across health and social care, retail, and the third sector are revolutionising the way they manage, engage and retain their staff.

name: BlubBlub
one_liner: Video modeling and gamified activities to help children improve their speech and language skills.
description: Speech therapists still assign homework on sheets of paper, because the industry has not yet been digitized. BlubBlub decided to change this by introducing its video app, which triggers sounds and words recorded by children and for children, helping them to practice in their specific language to address their specific speech problem. ‍ BlubBlub connects children, therapists and parents on one platform to ensure everyone plays a role in each child's progress.

name: TaxScouts
one_liner: Personal income tax autopilot enabling simplicity, automation, and speed.
description: TaxScouts (aquired by Taxfix in 2024) simplifies tax assessment and filing. ‍ The company has built the automation required to calculate, assess and reliably file personal income tax for non-standard incomes including professional freelancers, landlords, high earners and more.

name: Waypoint
one_liner: The international platform for fertilisers & commodity chemicals

name: Fiat Republic
one_liner: A purpose-built, fiat-as-a-service platform to solve fiat access challenges for crypto platforms.
description: Fiat Republic is on a mission to democratize fiat access for the Web3 economy. Fiat access is a systemic problem for crypto platforms and therefore requires a systemic solution. With our developer-first API, you can easily access everything you need to deliver better fiat experiences to your users and treasury teams. We’re unlocking and aggregating an ever increasing number of fiat rails with local and global tier-1 banks. Fiat Republic is able to give crypto platforms reliable access to best-in-class fiat products, all via a single API. We have developed a compliance-first approach that minimises friction in the on-ramp and off-ramp fiat-crypto flows. Our technology is augmented by the Fiat Republic Consortium. We’re building a coalition of crypto platforms to create a united voice, enabling us to continually add tier-1 global and local banking partners and have a seat at the table with regulators, to shape and influence the future rules that govern the space.

name: Juli
one_liner: Improving life for people with chronic conditions.
description: Juli integrates previously siloed data like data from smartphones and other wearables, environmental data and EHR data into one platform. All that data is analyzed to identify patterns and give recommendations that guide users towards better health. A patient-centric app allows the user to see their data in one dashboard, keep a journal, get reminders for their medication or be nudged towards micro-behavioural changes in a gamified way. ‍ juli is a SMART on FHIR platform that integrates easily into all kinds of health systems. This enables care providers to predict when a patient needs additional outreach to avoid a crisis and generates a common understanding of a patient's health status.

name: Quix
one_liner: Data streaming analytics platform

name: Abhi
one_liner: Pakistan's first financial wellness platform focused on democratizing credit for both individuals and businesses.
description: Founded in 2021, Abhi is building practical financial infrastructure for emerging markets. As a next-generation neobank, it provides Earned Wage Access and flexible SME financing that give workers and businesses quicker, more reliable access to liquidity. The model solves everyday cash-flow challenges and makes essential financial services easier to reach. Abhi also became the first MENAP-based startup to receive the World Economic Forum’s Technology Pioneer Award.

name: Agro.Club
one_liner: Two-sided agricultural marketplace with embedded financial services.
description: Agro.Club is digitizing the global agricultural value chain by connecting input suppliers, grain buyers, and farmers through a comprehensive digital ecosystem, aiming for greater transparency and efficiency in supply management. ‍ The platform offers essential digital services like e-commerce, grain procurement, and business intelligence. It also provides embedded financial solutions, including factoring and credit, directly within transactions, helping stabilize cash flow, expand capital access for agricultural partners, and simplifies complex supply chain interactions.

name: Andercore
one_liner: AI-powered industrial trade platform

name: Paradox
one_liner: Replacing fragmented tools with an AI-powered platform that unifies organizational intelligence and enables aligned decision-making.
description: Paradox is building a new kind of organizational intelligence — one that addresses a simple but costly truth: most leaders have little real-time insight into what’s happening across their companies. ‍ Despite layers of tools, meetings, and reports, strategic clarity often breaks down as companies scale. Teams pull in different directions, decisions drift, and precious time is lost chasing alignment that never quite clicks. Ironically, the systems meant to bring order often add more complexity, not less. ‍ That’s the paradox being solved. Instead of stacking yet another tool on top, Paradox has developed an AI-powered reasoning layer that connects the dots across the business — surfacing hidden constraints, tracking strategic flow, and ensuring the right people get the right information at the right time.

name: Bikemap
one_liner: Create, upload, and share your favorite cycle routes.
description: Bikemap is a platform where bike enthusiasts around the world create, upload and share their favorite cycle routes. The Bikemap app lets users record routes on the go, add their own photos or notes and share it all on social media. ‍ Bikemap has evolved to become the largest bike route collection in the world– with active users in more than 80 countries sharing their cycling experiences from all around the world. More than 1,500 new routes are created by Bikemap users on a every day; enriched with information such as route length and interactive elevation profile for every cycling route. To date, users have access to more than 3 million different routes.

name: bliq
one_liner: Empowering gig workers in the transport industry to manage their workflow across multiple platforms.
description: Berlin-based Bliq lets its users maximize their earnings while driving more safely, while creating a safer, fairer, more sustainable gig economy.

name: ClauseMatch
one_liner: Real-time document editing and collaboration for highly regulated industries.
description: Evolve with compliance. The award-winning ClauseMatch policy management, regulatory change management and compliance SaaS platform automates time-sucking tasks, organizes your data and makes collaboration and knowledge-sharing a breeze. ‍

name: Djust
one_liner: Modular B2B commerce platform automating sales operations
description: DJUST is a modular B2B commerce platform that enables companies to streamline their sales operations and increase productivity across the organization. With advanced payment capabilities and an Agentic Commerce approach, DJUST is redefining how businesses design, manage, and automate their commercial interactions. ‍ The platform empowers leading distributors, retailers, and manufacturers to break down system silos, digitise manual processes, and unlock new growth opportunities. More than a flexible order management system, DJUST is a foundational layer that helps future-proof businesses through scalability and continuous innovation. ‍ Backed by a global partner network, DJUST combines technological expertise with a human touch, supported by a team of 50+ B2B digital commerce experts across Europe.

name: Eunice
one_liner: Bridging data and action to empower the sustainable development of Web3 and Crypto.
description: Eunice is an AI fintech company solving B2B challenges in digital assets. Their first product is digital asset due diligence and monitoring to help financial institutions, regulators, and businesses navigate the complexities of the digital asset space. Powered by a proprietary knowledge base, Eunice’s platform enables token classification, risk analysis, and asset disclosure requirements. ‍ With a mission to bring transparency to the digital asset industry, Eunice builds products that drive regulatory clarity and operational efficiency, intending to accelerate the mainstream adoption of digital assets.

name: EXA Finance
one_liner: The most advanced marketplace for NFTs and fungible tokens on Algorand.
description: Incubated by Draper University and backed by prominent VCs, EXA Finance is the most advanced marketplace for NFTs and fungible tokens on Algorand. ‍ The platform offers a multitude of features such as assets bundle, NFT to NFT swap, auctions, offers, royalties, and peer-to-peer chat just to name a few. Users can now sell NFTs for any fungible token but also swap an NFT for multiple NFTs, opening a new range of possibilities.

name: Mundi
one_liner: Treasury-as-a-Service platform for companies without dedicated treasury teams to optimize funds in high-yield, low-risk financial products.
description: Mundi simplifies access to high-yield savings accounts by connecting users to 15+ Turkish banks through a single investment platform. With one-click access to overnight and long-term savings accounts for TRY and FX deposits, Mundi enables effortless, automated working capital management. Beyond savings accounts, users can dynamically allocate funds to low-risk financial products, including money market funds (MMFs) and overnight repo agreements, all within Mundi’s seamless investment platform. ‍

name: gronda
one_liner: Career platform for the hospitality and gastronomy sector.
description: Gronda is an industry blog and community platform designed to facilitate recruitment, transparency and knowledge exchange in the hospitality and gastronomy industries. ‍ The platform helps industry professionals showcase their expertise as well as connecting and applying to open positions. For companies, this is a one-stop-shop platform to recruit talent, build their employer brand, and solve their industry’s persistent labor shortage.

name: Invesdor
one_liner: Digital investment and financing platform for companies of all sizes.
description: Invesdor Group combines the leading digital equity funding platform in the Nordics, Invesdor, and the leading digital mid-size (“Mittelstand”) financier in the German speaking countries, Finnest. The service portfolio spans from equity investments, bonds, IPO’s, syndicated loans, mezzanine capital and promissory notes to other debt capital instruments. Financing volumes typically range from EUR 250,000 to EUR 25m. Over the last years the combined and accumulated investments on the legacy platforms have doubled every year, currently totalling at more than EUR 130m. ‍ Invesdor Group holds a MiFID license passported to 28 European countries, which was granted to Invesdor in April 2015, making it the first such platform to receive this licence. The Group has a base of over 50,000 registered private and institutional investors from 150 countries.

name: Iyzico
one_liner: Offering vendors a fast and easy way to receive payments online.
description: Iyzico (acquired by PayU in 2019) is Turkey’s leading ePayment company offering businesses easy solutions to accept payments online. ‍ The platform is tailored to the needs of the local market and integrates with over 22 different payment options and banks. Customers appreciate the easy setup process and features such as recurring payments and Iyzico’s marketplace solution.

name: Maqsad
one_liner: Building a personalized learning platform to make high-quality education accessible to 100 million Pakistani students.
description: Maqsad is a mobile-first edtech platform that delivers high-quality personalized academic content for 100 million Pakistani students. The platform provides a holistic learning experience where users can learn a concept, test their knowledge, and ask questions. The edtech has developed the MENAP region's first instant query-solving engine, which matches student queries to video solutions within seconds. In just the last 6 months, Maqsad has reached over 1 million students and answered 4 million plus student queries. The platform is building AI-enabled tools to increase personalization, adaptive learning, and build a data-driven ecosystem to improve learning outcomes. ‍

name: Onit
one_liner: Building your bank, free from hidden fees.
description: OnIt, a licensed bank in Kenya, offers a free transaction network linking consumers, businesses, and suppliers, enhanced with services like check-out finance, premium financial products, and open APIs for easy consumer integration.

name: receeve
one_liner: Fully digital debt-servicing platform for the entire collection lifecycle.
description: Receeve is turning the current way of collecting debt upside down, by using AI to provide personalized collections and replace the outdated process of lenders using phone calls or letters to reach indebted clients. ‍ With Receeve, firms can communicate with their customers digitally, on any device, and customers have the option of self-service to manage their issues. The platform covers the entire collections lifecycle from managing receivables to servicing NPL portfolios.

name: ReStabilise
one_liner: Multi-currency stablecoin issuance platform

name: Tranched
one_liner: Automating complex securitisation transactions, reducing friction and costs.
description: Tranched, is the first Deep Tokenisation embedded securitisation platform directly connecting lenders to investors, allowing them to structure and manage a transaction in a fraction of the time and cost. Our platform provides better, quicker, and more efficient access to financing for lenders, and broader investment opportunities to investors.

name: Wasmer
one_liner: Making WebAssembly accessible to developers and enterprises.
description: With Wasmer, enterprises can run ultra-lightweight containerized software with blazing-fast startup times, at near-native speeds anywhere — be it on servers, edge, and IoT devices or in serverless environments. ‍ It brings a vastly improved and simpler to use API, massive performance improvements, support for Apple Silicon, a pluggable infrastructure for easy customization, and support for “Headless Wasmer” a new ultra-lightweight runtime that is ideal for IoT.

name: Wikifolio
one_liner: Allowing day traders and asset managers to publish their portfolios for other traders to access and invest in.
description: Wikifolio is an online platform that allows day traders to publish their portfolios for other traders to access and invest. Investment bankers and hobby-traders alike can use this app to connect and evolve. ‍ The “wikifolios” turn portfolios created on the platform into fully-fledged financial products which are then listed on the stock exchange Börse Stuttgart. Each trade, including execution price and fees, is updated in real-time on Wikifolio and partner sites to give the user clarity over the movements in the market. Some of Wikifolio’s certificates have been consecutively included in the top 10 most-traded products in their category of the Stuttgart Stock Exchange (EUWAX) in 2017.
